FOnline ThirdParty pruning notes

This vendored copy is intentionally trimmed for the engine build. When updating
from upstream, remove these paths again after copying the new version.

Removed paths:
- apps/
- m4/
- man/
- scripts/
- tests/
- aclocal.m4
- cmake_uninstall.cmake.in
- compile
- config.guess
- config.sub
- configure
- configure.ac
- depcomp
- FindLibreSSL.cmake
- install-sh
- libcrypto.pc.in
- libssl.pc.in
- libtls.pc.in
- ltmain.sh
- Makefile.am
- Makefile.am.common
- Makefile.in
- missing
- openssl.pc.in
- tap-driver.sh
- test-driver
